title: Timeskip
description: TimeSkip is a lightweight 1.12.2/1.16.5/1.18.2 minecraft modpack featuring space exploration and Technology.
body:
![The Logo of Timeskip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1ff38e49a1e041060382b8c10069fda43e6048c.png)
---------
TimeSkip is a lightweight 1.12.2/1.16.5/1.18.2 minecraft modpack featuring space exploration and Technology. (Other versions are on our CURSEFORGE PAGE)

 

Will you build a space ship and explore space? or will you crash and burn trying to take off?

**Only one person can control this outcome, and that person is YOU**

---------
# NOTE

Not all versions will be the same, they will be very much different in many ways, however the goals are the same.

**Sometimes, there may be outdated mods inside of the modpacks, however as soon as I realized they need updates, I will post them**

---------
Use Code 'Matriarch" for 15% off your first month with [https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=168](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=168)!
